类 RpcDocBuildTemplate

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.template.RpcDocBuildTemplate
所有已实现的接口:
IBaseDocBuildTemplate, IDocBuildBaseTemplate, IDocBuildTemplate<RpcApiDoc>, IJavadocDocTemplate<RpcJavaMethod>, IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<WebSocketDoc>
public class RpcDocBuildTemplate extends Object implements IDocBuildTemplate<RpcApiDoc>, IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate<WebSocketDoc>, IJavadocDocTemplate<RpcJavaMethod>
(Apache Dubbo) rpc doc build template.

    从类继承的方法 Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    从接口继承的方法 IBaseDocBuildTemplate

    buildReturnApiParams, convertParamsDataToTree, getJavaParameterList, getMethodReturnType, getRewriteClassName, ignoreParamsSets, paramCommentResolve, replaceTypeName

    从接口继承的方法 IDocBuildBaseTemplate

    getCandidateClasses, handleApiGroup, isEntryPoint, preRender, skipClass

    从接口继承的方法 IDocBuildTemplate

    getApiData, postRender

    从接口继承的方法 IJavadocDocTemplate

    buildServiceMethod, convertToJavadocJavaMethod, getParentsClassAndInterfaceMethods, mergeJavadocMethods, methodDefinition, processClassHierarchy, requestParams, skipMethod

    从接口继承的方法 IWebSocketDocBuildTemplate

    getWebSocketData

    • ignoreReturnObject

      public boolean ignoreReturnObject(String typeName, List<String> ignoreParams)
      从接口复制的说明: IBaseDocBuildTemplate
      Determines whether the return object should be ignored based on its type name and a list of ignored parameters.
      指定者:
      ignoreReturnObject 在接口中 IBaseDocBuildTemplate
      参数:
      typeName - The name of the type to check.
      ignoreParams - A list of parameter names that should be ignored.
      返回:
      true if the return object should be ignored; false otherwise.
